name: FIG SALAD
intro: spoon the pomegranate seeds over the top, and serve.

ingredients.item: oz/60 g radicchio leaves (about 7), coarsely torn
ground cinnamon salt and black pepper

method: In a small cup, whisk together the remaining 2½ tablespoons olive oil, the vinegar, and cinnamon with a pinch of salt and some black pepper. Drizzle this over the salad, finish with the hazelnuts, and serve.
